title: Voxy Infinite Player Visibility
description: created using AI ! i wanted a mod to see other player build from far away, so here it is ! Work with Voxy (And shaders if pached)
body:
I am no dev so pls no hate bc i used ai, i just wanted to share this if someone want to do the same as me !
This mods make so players and mobs around other players can be seen by everyone on voxy LODS (there is settings to only enable one or the other with distance settings too) !

it look really good with voxy for server mods ! pls do try ! I didn't get any fps drop with 5 players...

* you will need to patch your shaderspack for entities to be correctly put behind lods blocks ! I did try with Eclipse And it work great ! here is the link to the github page if u want to try !

https://github.com/tristancrazy/Eclipse-Shader-EntitiesDist-Patch/tree/Stable-Voxy?tab=readme-ov-file

(the shaders still need some work for glass and water)
